sql: SELECT f.URUN_KODU, SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK f INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID AND f.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID = p.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') = '2025' GROUP BY f.URUN_KODU ORDER BY TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Groups production by product code and returns top 10 highest total production values for 2025
risk_notes: Uses BRUT_PRIM_TL as production metric, which aligns with business definition
description:
Question answered: Retrieves the top 10 total production values grouped by product code for the year 2025.
Tables used: AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK, AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET, AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH.
Filters: Filters records where the year is 2025 using TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') = '2025'.
Grouping/measures: Groups by URUN_KODU and sums BRUT_PRIM_TUTARI.
Expected output columns: URUN_KODU, TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI.
Assumptions: BRUT_PRIM_TL is assumed to represent the correct production metric.

sql: SELECT f.URUN_KODU, SUM(f.VOP_TL) AS TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET f INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID AND f.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID = p.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') = '2025' GROUP BY f.URUN_KODU ORDER BY TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Groups net premium production by product code and returns top 10 highest values for 2025
risk_notes: Uses VOP_TL as production metric, which represents pre-tax premium
description:
Question answered: Retrieves the top 10 net premium production values grouped by product code for the year 2025.
Tables used: AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET, AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET, AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH.
Filters: Filters records where the year is 2025 using TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') = '2025'.
Grouping/measures: Groups by URUN_KODU and sums VOP_TL.
Expected output columns: URUN_KODU, TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI.
Assumptions: VOP_TL is assumed to represent net premium production.

sql: SELECT f.URUN_KODU, SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK f INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID AND f.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID = p.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE t.TARIH BETWEEN TO_DATE('2025-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2025-12-31','YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY f.URUN_KODU ORDER BY TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Groups production by product code using explicit date range filter and returns top 10 highest values
risk_notes: Uses precise date range filtering instead of year mask
description:
Question answered: Retrieves the top 10 total production values grouped by product code for the year 2025.
Tables used: AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK, AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET, AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH.
Filters: Filters records using explicit date range between '2025-01-01' and '2025-12-31'.
Grouping/measures: Groups by URUN_KODU and sums BRUT_PRIM_TL.
Expected output columns: URUN_KODU, TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI.
Assumptions: BRUT_PRIM_TL is assumed to represent the correct production metric.
